about.title: About FISTIK
about.intro: FISTIK is a boutique dessert atelier where every detail matters. For Instagram guests, we offer a fast, elegant and personal ordering experience.
about.story: Every dessert tells a story. We blend traditional recipes with modern presentation for your special moments.
about.craft: All products are made in small batches with fresh ingredients and care.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: For orders, special requests or questions.
contact.hoursValue: Daily 09:00 – 21:00. Delivery time confirmed after order approval.

footer.tagline: Artisan bakery in Kaskelen — handcrafted cakes and pastries.

login.title: B2B Sign in
login.subtitle: Use the phone number and password provided by your administrator.

terms.title: B2B Agreement
terms.subtitle: Company: {company}. Please accept the terms on first login.
terms.body:
1. This agreement governs wholesale orders from FISTIK.
2. Minimum order total is 30,000 ₸.
3. B2B prices differ from retail and are set by the administrator.
4. Next month's discount depends on last month's paid total: from 500,000 ₸ — 3%, from 1,000,000 ₸ — 6%.
5. Delivery is arranged to the selected branch address.
6. Payment and order confirmation are completed via WhatsApp.
terms.acceptLabel: I have read and accept the agreement terms

catalog.stockNote: Wholesale orders are not limited by storefront stock.

checkout.title: B2B checkout
checkout.deliveryTimeNotice: Delivery time will be confirmed after order approval.
checkout.whatsappHint: WhatsApp will open to confirm your order.

errors.noBranches: No branch addresses on file. Contact admin.
